meta.ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions, Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances
meta.project_subject: Extension of SCDPM PMU for six months
meta.deliverables: Monitoring progress on SCDPM Portal; Data Analytics of SCDPM data; Drafting agenda for monthly review meetings; Preparing presentations/reports on ministry updates; Analysis of best practices monthly; Preparation of monthly Secretariat Reforms report; Any other tasks assigned by DARPG

content.full_text: The Department of Administrative Reforms and Public Grievances (DARPG) under the Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions extends the SCDPM PMU contract with Quality Council of India for six months from 11.02.2023 to 10.08.2023. The 3-member QCI team will monitor SCDPM portal progress, perform data analytics, draft meeting agendas, prepare reports, analyze best practices, and handle additional DARPG tasks. Total cost is Rs 30,24,600 plus GST, paid 25% on award, 25% after 3 months, and 50% on completion.
